_comment: Per-town landmarks and trunk roads, used by scripts/inject-area-landmarks.js to add hyperlocal SEO content to each area page. Big Ben can hand-edit to correct or expand any of these.

durham.landmarks: Durham Cathedral, the riverbanks, Durham University

chester-le-street.landmarks: Riverside Cricket Ground, Lumley Castle, Beamish nearby

houghton-le-spring.landmarks: Hetton Lyons Country Park, Houghton Cut

seaham.landmarks: Seaham Harbour, Tommy statue on the front, Featherbed Rocks

peterlee.landmarks: Castle Eden Dene, Apollo Pavilion, Beacon Hill industrial estate

hartlepool.landmarks: Hartlepool Marina, the Headland, HMS Trincomalee

hartlepool-headland.landmarks: Heugh Battery, Town Wall, the Fish Sands

bishop-auckland.landmarks: Auckland Castle, Kynren site, Newgate Centre

newton-aycliffe.landmarks: Aycliffe Business Park, Hitachi rail factory

spennymoor.landmarks: Tudhoe, Whitworth Park, Spennymoor Town Hall

stanley.landmarks: Beamish Museum, Tanfield Railway, Annfield Plain

crook.landmarks: Crook Hall, Tow Law, Hamsterley Forest nearby

barnard-castle.landmarks: Bowes Museum, Barnard Castle ruins, the Tees

sedgefield.landmarks: Sedgefield Racecourse, Hardwick Park, Ceddesfeld Hall

wingate.landmarks: Wingate Quarry, Castle Eden Walkway nearby

easington.landmarks: Easington Colliery, Beacon Point, Crimdon Beach

murton.landmarks: Murton Moor, Dalton Park outlet shopping

newcastle-upon-tyne.landmarks: Tyne Bridge, St James' Park, Quayside, Newcastle Central

gateshead.landmarks: Angel of the North, Sage / Glasshouse, MetroCentre, Baltic Centre

sunderland.landmarks: Stadium of Light, Roker Beach, Penshaw Monument, Wearmouth Bridge

south-shields.landmarks: South Shields seafront, Marsden Rock, Arbeia Roman Fort

north-shields.landmarks: Fish Quay, Royal Quays Marina, Tynemouth border

whitley-bay.landmarks: St Mary's Lighthouse, Spanish City, Whitley Sands

wallsend.landmarks: Segedunum Roman Fort, Hadrian's Wall east end

jarrow.landmarks: Bede's World, Jarrow Hall, Tyne Tunnel

washington.landmarks: Washington Wildfowl Centre, Old Hall, Galleries shopping

tynemouth.landmarks: Tynemouth Priory, Longsands beach, the Aquarium

birtley.landmarks: Komatsu plant, Bowes Railway, the Angel of the North minutes away

hexham.landmarks: Hexham Abbey, Tyne Green Country Park, Hexham Racecourse

morpeth.landmarks: Morpeth Court, Carlisle Park, Morpeth Bagpipe Museum

cramlington.landmarks: Northumbria Specialist Emergency Care Hospital, Manor Walks

blyth.landmarks: Blyth Quayside, Battery Wind Farm, Blyth Spartans ground

ashington.landmarks: Woodhorn Museum, Ashington Memorial, Wansbeck country park

bedlington.landmarks: Bedlington Country Park, BCA Bedlington auction yard

alnwick.landmarks: Alnwick Castle, the Treehouse, Alnwick Garden

berwick-upon-tweed.landmarks: The Walls, Royal Border Bridge, Spittal beach

prudhoe.landmarks: Prudhoe Castle, the Tyne Riverside Park

amble.landmarks: Amble Marina, Coquet Island view, the Braid

middlesbrough.landmarks: Riverside Stadium, Transporter Bridge, mima art gallery

stockton-on-tees.landmarks: Tees Barrage, Yarm Lane, Preston Park Museum

billingham.landmarks: Billingham Forum, Cowpen Bewley Woodland Park

redcar.landmarks: Redcar seafront, Vertical Pier, Eston Hills

yarm.landmarks: Yarm High Street, Yarm Viaduct, the Tees

darlington.landmarks: Head of Steam museum, the Locomotion replica, Darlington Memorial Hospital
